name: Global Brass and Copper Holdings, Inc.
description: Global Brass and Copper Holdings, Inc. is a leading converter, fabricator, distributor, and marketer of specialized copper and brass products in North America. The company processes copper and copper-alloy sheet, strip, plate, foil, rod, tube, and wire, serving diverse markets including building and construction, automotive, electrical, and industrial machinery. In 2019, the company was acquired by Wieland-Werke AG.
